_meta.purpose: Realised AUM and live-use snapshots for tokenised RWA. Read by .workspace/realised.html. Hand-maintained.

instruments.note: Largest tokenised US Treasury fund; on Ethereum, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Polygon, Optimism.
Total across BUIDL, BENJI, USDY, hashnote, etc.
Per Columbia 2025 RWA survey; includes treasuries, private credit, real estate, commodities.
First US-registered fund using a public blockchain for record-keeping.

live_pilots.name: MAS Project Guardian
live_pilots.scale: 40+ industry participants; tokenised funds, fixed income, FX

live_pilots.name: HKMA Project Ensemble / EnsembleTX
live_pilots.scale: Pilot phase launched Nov 2025; real-value tokenised deposits via HKD RTGS

live_pilots.name: BIS Project Agora
live_pilots.scale: 7 central banks + 40+ commercial banks; prototype phase

sceptical_signals.claim: Institutional tokenisation stalls on legal-enforceability ambiguity, liquidity fragmentation across chains, and custodial-cost overhang.
sceptical_signals.source: Oraclizer Research - Why Institutional Tokenization Stalls

sceptical_signals.claim: Tokenisation introduces run-risk, interconnectedness, and settlement-risk transmission channels not present in legacy infrastructure.
sceptical_signals.source: Federal Reserve - Tokenization: Overview and Financial Stability Implications

sceptical_signals.claim: Real estate is not the optimal RWA candidate: low velocity, jurisdictional fragmentation of title, weak fractional secondary-market liquidity.
